commands.help_message:
To report and delete a spam or unwanted message, group members can reply to it with the word: {{banKeyword}}

How it works:
• Each user has 1 unique vote per message.
• Upon reaching {{requiredVotes}} votes, the message is automatically deleted.
• Administrators can then evaluate the case with options to view or restore the message, ban the user who sent it, or ignore the report.
commands.i18n_menu_prompt: 🌍 Select the language for this group:
commands.faq_invalid_format: Invalid format or non-existent link. Use: /faq keyword https://t.me/group/id
commands.menu_moderation_desc: Reply to any message with `{{banKeyword}}` to start a removal vote. Upon reaching {{requiredVotes}} votes, the message is deleted, the suspicious user is muted, and admins are notified.
commands.menu_faq_add: `/faq keyword link` — Register a quick answer (admins only).
commands.menu_faq_list: `/faqs` — List all FAQs for this group.
commands.menu_faq_remove: `/faq rm keyword` — Remove a FAQ (admins only).
commands.menu_faq_trigger: Reply to a message with `/faq keyword` to trigger the corresponding FAQ.
commands.menu_media_desc: Send a photo or video with the caption `/media`. The media will be saved in the official Gallery and the Bot will post the link in the group.
commands.menu_gist_desc: `/gist language code` — Creates a public Gist on GitHub and posts the link in the group.
commands.menu_lang_desc: `/i18n` — Change the bot language for this group (admins only).
commands.menu_auto_delete: This message will be automatically deleted in 1 minute to keep the Group clean.
commands.temp_chat_created: ✅ Room {{roomId}} created! Share the link to invite participants: Join the room Or send the command: /chat {{roomId}} ⏰ Expires in {{minutes}} minute(s). To close: /chat close To leave: /chat exit
commands.temp_chat_joined: ✅ You joined room {{roomId}}! Send messages here in private chat and everyone will see them.
commands.temp_chat_full: ❌ This room has reached the maximum number of users.
commands.temp_chat_already_in: ℹ️ You are already in this room.
commands.temp_chat_not_in_room: ℹ️ You are not in any room.
commands.temp_chat_no_permission: ❌ Only the room creator can close the room.
commands.temp_chats_empty: No active rooms at the moment.
commands.temp_chat_expired_notify: ⏰ The room has expired and was automatically closed.
commands.temp_chat_closed_by_owner: ⚠️ This room was closed by the creator.

vote.use_ban_reply: Use {{banKeyword}} replying to the suspicious message.

admin.error_no_restorable_content: No restorable content saved for this type of message.
admin.error_ban_failed_permissions: Failed to ban. Check bot permissions.

media.success_posted:
📸 Media successfully posted by {{authorName}} to the official gallery.

🔗 *[Access Media]({{postLink}})*
media.error_forwarding: ❌ An error occurred while sending your media to our Gallery Channel. Check the Bot console.

gist.error_missing_language: ❌ Please provide the language. Example: /gist python def add(a, b): return a + b
gist.error_missing_code: ❌ Please provide the code after the language. Example: /gist python def add(a, b): return a + b
gist.error_api_failed: ❌ An error occurred while creating the Gist on GitHub. Check the Bot console.
